Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x6000 "STEALTH-0400-6000" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $0400 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Stealth.prg"
Metadata.Notes:
Added an init routine at $0400 which sets $DD00 to $96 to allow the game to run correctly.
Also made a PAL fix by changing the values at $1151, $1152 from $F6 to $EA and $1155 from $F6 to $01. These values are used to set the lines at which certain raster IRQs fire (values are used to set $D012). Without this fix, the game would lock-up at certain points on a PAL machine.
And finally changed the STA $D01A instruction at $7BD1 to be BEQ $7BDC, NOP instead in order to remove highscore saving to disk.
